Class BillService

java.lang.Object
com.finvision.service.BillService
@Service public class BillService extends Object
Core service for bill management in Finvision.

Responsibilities include:

  • Building the BillService.AlertsBillView used to render the Alerts page
  • Tracking payment status and recording partial/full payments
  • Auto-generating the next recurring bill instance when a bill is fully paid
  • Computing bell-notification items for the global navigation badge
  • Evaluating active reminders for upcoming and overdue bills

    buildActiveReminderItems(String username)
    Returns reminder items for bills whose pre-due or overdue reminder days match today's date and that are not currently snoozed.

    Returns true when the frequency string represents a recurring schedule (weekly, monthly, or yearly).

    Records a payment against a bill and marks it fully paid when the cumulative paid amount meets or exceeds the bill amount.

    Resets a bill's payment status, clearing paid amount and timestamp.
    LocalDate
    nextDueDate(LocalDate dueDate, String frequency)
    Calculates the next due date for a recurring bill.
    List<Integer>
    normalizeBefore(List<Integer> raw)
    Normalizes a raw list of pre-due reminder days, always including day 0 (the due day itself) and returning values in descending order.
    List<Integer>
    normalizeOverdue(List<Integer> raw)
    Normalizes a raw list of post-due (overdue) reminder days, excluding non-positive values.
    void

    Snoozes the bill's reminder by setting snoozedUntil to today plus the requested number of days (minimum 1).
    boolean
    suggestRecurringMonthly(String username, String billName)
    Returns true when the user has added at least 2 one-time bills with the same name, indicating they may want to convert it to recurring.

  • Constructor Details

    • BillService

      public BillService()

  • Method Details

    • findBillsForUser

      public List<Bill> findBillsForUser(String username)
      Returns all bills for the given user sorted by due date ascending.
      Parameters:
      username - the authenticated user's username
      Returns:
      list of bills, or an empty list if the username is blank

    • buildAlertsBillView

      public BillService.AlertsBillView buildAlertsBillView(String username)
      Builds the full view model for the Alerts & Notifications page.

      Categorizes each bill into overdue, due-soon (within 3 days), upcoming, or paid-this-month buckets and computes summary statistics (counts, totals, paid percentage, and a month-grouped list of all bills).

      Parameters:
      username - the authenticated user's username
      Returns:
      an BillService.AlertsBillView containing all display-ready data

    • buildActiveReminderItems

      public List<BillService.ActiveReminderItem> buildActiveReminderItems(String username)
      Returns reminder items for bills whose pre-due or overdue reminder days match today's date and that are not currently snoozed.
      Parameters:
      username - the authenticated user's username
      Returns:
      list of BillService.ActiveReminderItem sorted by due date

    • normalizeBefore

      public List<Integer> normalizeBefore(List<Integer> raw)
      Normalizes a raw list of pre-due reminder days, always including day 0 (the due day itself) and returning values in descending order. Defaults to [7, 3, 1, 0] when the input is null or empty.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw reminder-days list from the form or bill document
      Returns:
      sorted, deduplicated list of reminder days in descending order

    • normalizeOverdue

      public List<Integer> normalizeOverdue(List<Integer> raw)
      Normalizes a raw list of post-due (overdue) reminder days, excluding non-positive values. Defaults to [1, 3] when the input is null or empty.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw overdue-days list from the form or bill document
      Returns:
      sorted, deduplicated list of positive overdue days

    • markAsPaid

      public void markAsPaid(Bill bill, Double paidAmountNow)
      Records a payment against a bill and marks it fully paid when the cumulative paid amount meets or exceeds the bill amount.

      For variable bills the payment is also appended to the bill's amountHistory. When the bill is fully paid and recurring, a new bill instance for the next period is saved.

      Parameters:
      bill - the bill to update (must not be null)
      paidAmountNow - the dollar amount paid now; if null or zero, the outstanding balance is applied

    • markAsUnpaid

      public void markAsUnpaid(Bill bill)
      Resets a bill's payment status, clearing paid amount and timestamp.
      Parameters:
      bill - the bill to revert (must not be null)

    • snooze

      public void snooze(Bill bill, int days)
      Snoozes the bill's reminder by setting snoozedUntil to today plus the requested number of days (minimum 1).
      Parameters:
      bill - the bill to snooze (must not be null)
      days - number of days to snooze; values below 1 are treated as 1

    • isRecurring

      public boolean isRecurring(String frequency)
      Returns true when the frequency string represents a recurring schedule (weekly, monthly, or yearly).
      Parameters:
      frequency - the frequency value stored on a bill
      Returns:
      true if recurring, false for one-time or unknown

    • nextDueDate

      public LocalDate nextDueDate(LocalDate dueDate, String frequency)
      Calculates the next due date for a recurring bill.
      Parameters:
      dueDate - the current due date
      frequency - the recurrence frequency ("weekly", "monthly", "yearly")
      Returns:
      the advanced due date, or the original date for one-time bills

    • suggestRecurringMonthly

      public boolean suggestRecurringMonthly(String username, String billName)
      Returns true when the user has added at least 2 one-time bills with the same name, indicating they may want to convert it to recurring.
      Parameters:
      username - the authenticated user's username
      billName - the bill name to check (case-insensitive)
      Returns:
      true if 2 or more matching one-time bills exist

    • buildBellItems

      public List<BillService.BellItem> buildBellItems(String username)
      Builds the list of bell-notification items for the global navbar badge. Includes unpaid bills that are due within 7 days or overdue, excluding currently snoozed bills. Results are sorted by due date ascending.
      Parameters:
      username - the authenticated user's username
      Returns:
      list of BillService.BellItem objects for display in the navbar dropdown
